H4: Search ``` ================================================== AFTER OPTIMIZED STRUCTURE ================================================== ``` H1: Custom Retractable Table Top Banner Stands with 36" x 24" Banner H2: Professional Table Top Retractable Banner Stands for Trade Shows & Events H2: Order Custom Table Top Retractable Banner Stands for Professional Displays H2: Retractable Table Top Banner Stand Material for Trade Show Displays H2: Table Top Banner Stand Production & Turnaround Times H2: Professional Design Services for Custom Table Top Banner Stands H2: Payment & Ordering Options for Table Top Retractable Banner Stands H2: Shipping Guidelines for Table Top Banner Stand Delivery H2: Trade Show & Event Uses for Table Top Retractable Banner Stands H2: Artwork Requirements for Table Top Banner Stand Printing H2: Order Professional Table Top Banner Stands for Your Next Event ``` ================================================== PRODUCT HEADER ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW # Custom Retractable Table Top Banner Stands with 36" x 24" Banner ## Professional Table Top Retractable Banner Stands for Trade Shows & Events PASTE INTO: Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Material Choice: Choose your banner material for optimal display performance Product: Complete system with Retractor Lite Table Top Hardware Quantity: Select quantity for your trade show needs Size (H x W): Professional 36" x 24" display size PASTE INTO: Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Custom Table Top Retractable Banner Stands for Professional Displays

The Retractor Lite Table Top is perfect for customers who do an occasional trade show, or other instances when you will not need to change the banner frequently. This professional table top display system combines premium banner materials with durable retractable hardware for maximum impact at trade shows, conferences, and business events.

With this product, you will receive the complete banner retractor hardware and a professionally printed 36" x 24" banner. Our table top retractable banner stands are designed for easy setup and transport, making them ideal for businesses that need portable, professional displays for various events.

Choose from multiple high-quality banner materials including 13 oz vinyl for durability, 14 oz no-curl vinyl for premium presentation, or banner soft fabric for vibrant color reproduction. Each material is specifically engineered for retractable banner stand applications and trade show environments.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Retractable Table Top Banner Stand Material for Trade Show Displays

Material Options for Professional Table Top Banner Stands:

13 oz Vinyl: Our most standard banner material, rated for both indoor and outdoor use. This durable material provides excellent print quality and longevity for frequent trade show use.

14 oz No Curl Vinyl: High quality prints with a smooth matte finish. This premium material resists curling and maintains a professional appearance throughout extended display periods.

Banner Soft Fabric: Matte finish with vibrant colors. This lightweight fabric material provides exceptional color saturation and a premium look for high-end trade show displays.

Exact sizes of banners cannot be guaranteed. Vinyl is a temperature sensitive material, and some fluctuation can occur due to heat application in printing, finishing, and outside climate. Please note our acceptable size variance is up to 1/2 inch per linear foot (ex. A 5' banner could finish with a 2.5" variance). If your banner needs to be precise, please ask your Customer Service Representative to discuss your specific application.

Click here to request a free sample packet of materials.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Table Top Banner Stand Setup & Display Options

Your Retractor Lite Table Top Banner Stand includes professional finishing and setup features designed for trade show environments:

Retractable Mechanism: Smooth pull-up and retraction system for easy setup and takedown at events

Compact Base: Stable table top base designed to fit standard trade show tables and display surfaces

Banner Attachment: Secure banner attachment system that keeps your display taut and professional-looking

Portable Design: Lightweight construction for easy transport between trade shows and events

Quick Setup: No tools required - simply place on table, pull up banner, and you're ready to display

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Table Top Banner Stand Production & Turnaround Times

We provide flexible production time ranges for you to choose from. Because it's important for you to have ultimate control over your order, our production times range from one to five business days. This allows you to make the final decision on when you need your order.

2 Business Days Express:
Have an extra day, but still need your products quickly? The express option is ideal for you!

  • Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day
  • Emergency/same day rushes are available in some cases, Please speak with a customer service representative today for more information
  • Note: The time it will take to receive your product includes the production time as well as the shipping time
  • Turnaround starts from the time the file upload is complete. If an order is flagged in our prepress department or a proof is requested awaiting approval, turnaround starts from the time the approval is given

3 Business Days Standard:
This is our most popular fast turnaround option. Free and speedy enough for almost any custom order.

5 Business Days Saver:
If you're not in a rush, then you can save some money by choosing our 5-Days Saver option.

PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Payment & Ordering Options for Table Top Retractable Banner Stands

All table top banner stands must be paid for prior to being put into production. We accept multiple payment methods for your convenience:

Accepted Credit Cards:

  • Visa
  • MasterCard
  • American Express
  • Discover

Check Payments: We also accept checks, which must be received before your order is put into production. For more information on check orders, see this article on our blog.

We will not charge your credit card until you have approved your order.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Guidelines for Table Top Banner Stand Delivery

If you have any questions about shipping, please contact customer service at (320) 391-5300 prior to ordering. Unless otherwise specified at the time of ordering, your order will be shipped standard.

You will receive a tracking number once your package has been shipped.

Shipping prices are determined by the weight and destination of the package. Additional shipping charges apply to large orders.

Available Shipping Methods:

  • Economy (5–10 Business Days)
  • Standard (3–5 Business Days)
  • Three Day (3 Business Days)
  • Two Day (2 Business Day)
  • Overnight (1 Business Day)

International Shipping Notes:
For international shipments, customers must provide both shipping labels and customs documentation. Currently, we only accept international shipping labels from USPS and UPS. For more details, please contact our customer service team.

After products have been shipped, all shipping company terms and conditions apply for lost or delayed packages. Please visit our shipping information page for more information about our Retractor Lite Table Top shipping times.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Trade Show & Event Uses for Table Top Retractable Banner Stands

Trade Shows & Conventions: Perfect for booth displays, product showcases, and informational presentations at industry events

Business Conferences: Ideal for speaker introductions, company branding, and presentation backdrops

Sales Meetings: Professional displays for client presentations and sales demonstrations

Job Fairs: Eye-catching recruitment displays that attract potential candidates

Retail Environments: Point-of-sale displays, product promotions, and seasonal advertising

Corporate Events: Company meetings, product launches, and internal communications

Educational Settings: School presentations, career fairs, and informational displays

Healthcare Facilities: Patient information displays and health awareness campaigns

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Artwork Requirements for Table Top Banner Stand Printing

File Format Guidelines:
Vector-based file types will print best, such as .eps or .ai (Adobe Illustrator) — with fonts converted to outlines. We can also print high resolution .pdf or .jpg files. If you are unsure of the quality of your files, our professional graphic designers will be more than happy to help you.

Resolution Requirements:
For optimal print quality on table top banner stands, submit files at 300 DPI or higher resolution.

File Size Limitations:
Upload files up to 60 MB through our online system. For files larger than 60 MB, please call for instructions to ensure the fastest service.

Proofing Services:
If you would like to double-check your order for correct information, requesting an order proof will allow you to do that. Your order proof will include a low-resolution image of your artwork, a summary of your order (including pricing), as well as your billing and shipping information. Please note that if you request a proof, we will not send your order into production until you have sent your approval.

Color Matching:
If your project is color critical, we recommend using our Color Match Proof System, as this is the best way to ensure the color match for your specific project. For more details, please contact a customer service representative.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Professional Table Top Banner Stands for Your Next Event

Ready to create a professional display for your next trade show or business event? Our Retractor Lite Table Top Banner Stands combine premium materials with reliable hardware to deliver outstanding results.

Why Choose Banners.com for Your Table Top Banner Stands?

Customer Service: Our customer service is 100% in-house and comprised of friendly, professional graphic designers.

Fast Turnaround: Choose between a 1, 2, 3, or 5 day production time to complete your order on your schedule.

Quality Products: Our products are made with the finest materials available and printed using the latest technology.

Live Order Tracking: Track your order, every step of the way, with our proprietary Live Order Tracking system.

Contact our customer service team at (320) 391-5300 to discuss your table top banner stand requirements or get started with your custom order today.

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions About Table Top Banner Stands

What comes included with the Retractor Lite Table Top Banner Stand?

You will receive the complete banner retractor hardware and a professionally printed 36" x 24" banner. The system includes the retractable base, banner attachment mechanism, and all necessary components for immediate use.

How easy is it to set up the table top banner stand?

The Retractor Lite Table Top requires no tools for setup. Simply place the base on your table, pull up the banner, and secure it in position. The entire setup takes less than 30 seconds.

What banner materials work best for trade show displays?

For trade shows, we recommend 14 oz No Curl Vinyl for its smooth matte finish and professional appearance, or Banner Soft Fabric for vibrant color reproduction and premium look.

Can I change the banner in my retractable stand?

The Retractor Lite Table Top is designed for customers who do occasional trade shows and will not need to change banners frequently. For frequent banner changes, consider our premium retractable banner stand options.

How portable is the table top banner stand?

The Retractor Lite Table Top is designed for easy transport with lightweight construction that fits easily in trade show cases or vehicle transport.

What's the difference between the material options?

13 oz Vinyl offers standard durability for both indoor and outdoor use. 14 oz No Curl Vinyl provides premium quality with a smooth matte finish that resists curling. Banner Soft Fabric delivers vibrant colors with a premium appearance.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
